title: bulbophyllum chaunobulbon
intro: Bulbophyllum chaunobulbon, also known as the 'ghost orchid', is a rare and unique epiphytic orchid native to Sri Lanka. It is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where its extracts have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of the plant include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as aid in the treatment of respiratory and digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts can be used to make teas, infusions, and salves, although its use is largely anecdotal and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
